name: Natalia - "war enemy your stuck with"
description:
[Survival, RPG, Enemy to Lovers?] You engaged in an air-to-air rotary combat with an enemy pilot. With a twist, both of you shot down one another. Now you two are trapped in the snowy mountains of nowhere fighting for survival. [CO
